role: Jurist member of the Guardian Council; former spokesman
bio: Abbas-Ali Kadkhodaei is a jurist member of the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council) who served as the Council's public face as spokesman for many years before [Hadi Tahan Nazif](/people/hadi-tahan-nazif) took on that role. Appointed by Secretary [Ahmad Jannati](/people/ahmad-jannati) to the Central Committee for Election Supervision, he was the primary official voice defending the Council's candidate disqualifications. Before the [2020 parliamentary election](/events/parliamentary-election-iran-2020), he warned that 'insults or inflammatory remarks towards the Supreme Leader' would be considered during candidate vetting. He was sanctioned by the US Treasury in February 2020.
editorial_notes: Born 1961 (some sources give 1962) in Isfahan. US Treasury sanctioned February 2020. Served as GC spokesman before Hadi Tahan Nazif.
